name: Charleston Chayote Delight
recipeIngredient: 1/2 stick butter (or extra virgin olive oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice the chayotes into thin pieces.
2. Heat a large cast-iron frying pan over medium heat.
3. Add the butter (or olive oil) to the pan and let it melt.
4. Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the pan.
5. Stir in the diced radishes and cook until all ingredients are combined and heated through, stirring occasionally.
